evals.prompt: 帮我对这个仓库做一次架构健康体检，重点看 AI coding 会不会放大长期腐化。已知 src/domain/user/status.ts、src/api/userDto.ts 和 src/features/billing/userStatus.ts 各有一份用户状态定义；CLAUDE.md 还让 agent 往 src/types/api.ts 写 API 类型，但现在 API 类型已经由 src/generated/api 生成。
evals.expected_behavior: Use architecture-health report shape, classify as repo/module health rather than PR review, and report root controls such as OWN/PROOF/CTX with evidence, impact, AI-coding failure mode, fix, validation, and confidence.

process.value: (OWN|source of truth|状态 owner|状态|所有权|invariant|不变量)
(未来变化|future change|change class|AI-coding failure mode|agent.*(漏|miss|copy|复制|误读))

evals.prompt: 审计这个模块：有一个 600 行的 checkout.ts，但它是线性流程；真正的问题是 pricing rule 同时写在 checkout.ts、discountBanner.tsx 和 analytics mapper 里，测试只覆盖 UI snapshot。
evals.expected_behavior: Avoid reporting large file as primary issue. Identify duplicated pricing decision and missing proof as OWN/PROOF root risk with future-change and AI-coding failure path.

process.value: (不是.*600|large file.*not|大文件.*不是|线性流程)

evals.prompt: 帮我 review staged diff，看看能不能合并。里面改了 auth cache 和 logout。
evals.expected_behavior: Do not use architecture-health audit sections. Route to dbx-diff-review or state that concrete diff review belongs there.

evals.prompt: 帮我看看架构有没有问题，但我没有仓库、目录树、代码或文档。
evals.expected_behavior: Ask for the smallest missing artifact/scope instead of inventing architecture findings or generic principles.

trigger.value: (仓库|目录|文件树|代码|文档|scope|范围|artifact|证据)

evals.prompt: 做一次 architecture health audit。已知问题：packages/web/src/shared 里堆了很多 feature-private 配置；packages/api 暴露的 DTO 被 web store 直接持久化；没有 contract test。审计后不要改代码，只给防腐路线图。
evals.expected_behavior: Produce read-only architecture health audit with Now/Next/Later anti-decay roadmap and handoff suggestions, without modifying code or writing implementation plan details.

trigger.value: (防腐路线图|Now|Next|Later|Do not do|审计范围)

evals.prompt: 快速审计这个内部 CRUD prototype：只有 6 个 route、一个 SQLite 表、两个页面，预计只给 3 个人用两周。目录很扁平，没有 domain layer，也没有复杂测试。看架构健康，但不要把它当大系统。
evals.expected_behavior: Use quick_map or a compact bounded audit. Apply the simple-system guard, avoid treating missing DDD/layering/extensive tests as a main finding, and report only concrete future-change or invariant risks if evidence supports them.

process.value: (不需要|不要|避免|over-architect|过度架构|simple-system guard|小系统)

output.value: (Evidence|证据|未验证|低置信度|Confidence|置信度)

evals.prompt: 只给你这些信息：目录树里有 apps/web、packages/api、packages/shared，还有 README 说 shared 放通用工具。没有代码、没有测试、没有 import 图。请判断架构是不是 high-risk。
evals.expected_behavior: Do not invent concrete findings or claim the repo is high-risk/healthy. Produce a bounded or blocked response that states missing evidence, confidence limits, and the smallest next artifacts needed.

trigger.value: (信息不足|证据不足|bounded|blocked|无法|不能|missing|缺少)

process.value: (需要|请提供|下一步|最小|smallest|low confidence|低置信度)

evals.prompt: 我们要不要拆 monorepo？请比较组织成本、发布节奏、迁移风险、可逆性，最后给 go/no-go 建议。没有要求做 repo 体检。
evals.expected_behavior: Do not produce the architecture-health audit contract. Route to dbx-decision-framing or dbx-linus-review depending on whether the task is trade-off decision or strict technical critique.

evals.prompt: 解释一下 Clean Architecture 是什么，给一个简单例子，不需要看我的仓库。
evals.expected_behavior: Do not start a repository architecture-health audit. Answer the concept question directly and avoid architecture-health report sections.

process.value: (Clean Architecture|整洁架构|干净架构|依赖方向|分层)
